title: Picture Word Match
description: A first decoding game where kids match real object pictures to written CVC words.
learningGoals: Connect spoken words, pictures, and printed CVC words
Use audio support so reading is invited but not required
interactionModel: match-pairs tap a picture card and its written word card
feedbackModel: Correct picture-word pairs sparkle and speak the matched word; a miss gets a gentle wiggle, spoken nudge, and retry.

modes.title: Match the Word
modes.skill: picture-to-print matching with familiar CVC words

modes.title: More Words
modes.skill: picture-to-print matching with additional CVC words

credits: Kaigani; shared QLOBE Kids object-card art. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
